title: The Silent Stranger
writer: Vincenzo Cerami, Giancarlo Ferrando, Tony Anthony
actors: Tony Anthony, Lloyd Battista, Hitoshi Ômae
plot: An American gunfighter is tasked with delivering a valuable scroll to a feudal lord in Japan, and becomes embroiled in a feud between the lord and his rival cousin over ownership of land owed to a young princess in their care.
